page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads and artificial intelligence applications. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 188.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 5.88 GB of memory per core. For acceleration, it bundles a single NVIDIA A10 GPU from the Ampere architecture with 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not included, meaning storage must be provisioned externally, while network connectivity is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in specialized tasks, particularly in large language model (LLM) inference. For a small 135M model, the instance achieves top-tier prompt processing speeds of 9700.0 tokens per second and text generation speeds of 454.43 tokens per second. With a medium 7B model, it maintains top-tier performance, processing 2489.49 tokens per second for prompts and generating 90.21 tokens per second. General CPU and memory benchmarks, such as Geekbench and PassMark, place the instance in the average tier, though multi-threaded bzip3 decompression shows strong performance at 160.79 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge offers a balanced hardware profile for organizations requiring dedicated CPU resources alongside GPU acceleration without the overhead of local storage. The dedicated core allocation ensures consistent compute performance, avoiding multi-tenant CPU contention. This configuration is highly suited for medium-scale AI inference, machine learning model evaluation, graphics rendering, and parallel data decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c32g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.9 GHz. It is equipped with 188.0 GB of RAM and a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage but provides a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights top-tier performance in LLM inference, achieving 2489.49 tokens per second for prompt processing on medium 7B models. General CPU and memory benchmarks fall within the average range, while multi-threaded decompression tasks perform strongly. This server is optimized for workloads such as AI inference, machine learning, and GPU-accelerated compute tasks where dedicated CPU resources and moderate GPU memory are required.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and an NVIDIA A10 GPU for efficient AI inference and parallel computing.

1x NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of Ampere-architecture VRAM
188.0 GB of system memory and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
